title: I've Found In You A Place
html: Intro: C/E F Am7 G C/E F Am7 G/B (2X) C/E F I've found in you a place Am7 G Where all my fears fall way C/E F Am7 G It's here I want to stay forever C/E F I've found a life in you Am7 G And all I want to do C/E F Am7 G Is worship only you forever Intro: C/E F Am7 G C/E F Am7 G/B C/E F I've seen the light that shines Am7 G/B It is your love divine C/E F Am7 G Breaking the chains that bind my soul C/E F The splendor in your eyes Am7 G/B Awakens me inside C/E F Am7 G From this love I cannot hide F There is no better place to be G Than hidden in your heart so deep F Am7 G I know that I am safe in you, my Jesus C F I find myself in your eyes Am7 G For i'm yours, and you are mine C F Your holiness amazes me Am7 G When i'm lost in your arms C/E F Am7 G For you are Ho-ly, Ho-ly C/E F Am7 G you are Ho-ly, Ho-ly C/E F Am7 G you are Ho-ly, Ho-ly C/E F Am7 G you are Ho-ly, Ho-ly C/E F Am7 G Holy, oh Lord
